title: kohleria × hansteinii
intro: Kohleria × hansteinii, also known as the Hanstein's Gloxinia, is a hybrid plant species within the Gesneriaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Kohleria × hansteinii include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate stress. Kohleria × hansteinii is typically prepared for medicinal use in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
